text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $60k while Ethereum has stalled completely, suggesting cautious consolidation rather than conviction in either direction. Extreme fear sentiment and a 7-day deterioration in the mood indicate recent selling pressure, though the relatively modest 24-hour moves across majors and $46B volume imply exhaustion rather than panic liquidation. Bitcoin's rising dominance to 55.8% reflects rotation away from altcoins like Solana and BNB, a typical flight-to-safety pattern in risk-off environments.
